description: You are a data engineer at a health-tech startup working on a Node.js pipeline that parses, anonymizes, and exports legacy HL7 v2 messages to JSON for machine learning research. Fix the five bugs in the pipeline at /home/ga/workspace/hl7_anonymizer/ to resolve crashes on certain records, missing lab results, incorrect date shifts, premature exits, and PII leaks (patient addresses and phone numbers). Ensure the test suite passes and the output is strictly anonymized.
